name: Mare Incognitum
description: A sound manifesto of an unstable cartography. Instrumental album by Ernesto Cisneros Cino exploring uncharted sonic territories between electronic textures and organic sound.

name: Mare Incognitum | Ernesto Cisneros Cino
description: Mare Incognitum - Un manifiesto sonoro de una cartografía inestable. Álbum instrumental por Ernesto Cisneros Cino.
